legalShort: Unofficial, non-commercial fan project. Made by fans, for fans. No donations accepted.
legalFull: This is an unofficial, non-commercial fan project created for research, documentation, and game development practice.

All Pokémon characters, names, concepts, referenced imagery, and related intellectual property belong to their original owners. Pokémon Concierge and related official material belong to their respective rights holders.
We do not claim ownership of the Pokémon IP, Pokémon Concierge, characters, official assets, screenshots, names, or copyrighted material shown or referenced on this website.
We do not accept donations, payments, crowdfunding, sponsorships, or financial support in any kind or form. Encouragement and non-financial support are appreciated.

All source code created for this project is open source. Original models, sprites, diagrams, tools, and other assets created during development may be reused elsewhere with appropriate credit, unless otherwise stated. Official/reference material remains the property of its respective owners.
